who: logistics operations managers processing 10–20 delivery manifests/month
offer: For logistics operations managers processing 10–20 delivery manifests/month, manual compliance reporting causes late orders and supplier penalties. We convert delivery manifests into digital compliance reports instead of manual reporting processes using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual compliance reporting leads to errors and inefficiencies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics operations managers
Indie Hackers discussions on compliance reporting
DM outreach to logistics managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for logistics tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
